title: no verilog.h file when trying to build the rocket-chip C emulator
body:
Hey, I'm trying to build the C simulator for the rocket-chip project, but apparently the Verilator version the build tool fetched did not include a verilog.c or verilog.h in the src folder. For reference the build script fetches Verilator from Veripool. Any way to get Verilator to build properly?

```
make -C verilator/src/verilator-4.028 verilator_bin
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028'
------------------------------------------------------------
making verilator in src
make -C src 
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src'
make -C obj_dbg -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[3]: Entering directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src/obj_dbg'
make[3]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[3]: Leaving directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[3]: Entering directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src/obj_dbg'
      Compile flags:  g++ -I/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/include -I/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/include -std=gnu++14 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow -I/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/share/verilator"
g++ -I/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/include -std=gnu++14  -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow -I/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/include -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -DYYDEBUG 	 -ggdb -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -MP  -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/install/share/verilator\" -Wno-char-subscripts -Wno-unused -c ../V3ParseGrammar.cpp
In file included from ../V3ParseGrammar.cpp:27:
verilog.c:308:10: fatal error: verilog.h: No such file or directory
compilation terminated.
make[3]: *** [../Makefile_obj:298: V3ParseGrammar.o] Error 1
make[3]: Leaving directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: *** [Makefile:70: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028/src'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:231: verilator_bin] Error 2
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/nam-huynh/rocket-chip/emulator/verilator/src/verilator-4.028'
make: *** [Makefrag-verilator:42: verilator/src/verilator-4.028/bin/verilator] Error 2
```
